[textmode.js](../../../index.md) / [TextmodeGrid](../../TextmodeGrid.md) / cols

# Accessor: cols

## Get Signature

```ts
get cols(): number;
```

Number of columns in the grid.

### Returns

`number`

### Example

<TextmodeApiSandbox profile="textmode.js" language="javascript" title="cols" encoded-code="" />

## Set Signature

```ts
set cols(newCols): void;
```

Set the number of columns and lock grid sizing until `responsive()` is called.

### Parameters

| Parameter | Type |
| ------ | ------ |
| `newCols` | `number` |

### Returns

`void`

### Example

<TextmodeApiSandbox profile="textmode.js" language="javascript" title="cols" encoded-code="" />
